evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 28664300. 2017/08/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To quantitatively compare the efficacy and toxicity of salvage 
radical prostatectomy (RP), high-intensity focused ultrasound (HIFU), 
cryotherapy, stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT), low-dose-rate (LDR) 
brachytherapy, and high-dose-rate (HDR) brachytherapy.
EVIDENCE ACQUISITION: We performed a systematic review of PubMed, EMBASE, and 
MEDLINE. Two- and 5-yr recurrence-free survival (RFS) rates and crude incidences 
of severe GU and GI toxici
